overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a block-style video game resembling Minecraft, depicting a nighttime walk along a grassy dirt path with a wooden fence toward a distant wooden house under a bright moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy field with dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through tall grass at night, with a wooden fence running along the right side

entered.detail: large bright square moon in the night sky providing illumination
narrow dirt trail winding through the grass
simple wooden post fence running alongside the path
tall green grass covering the ground on both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through an open grassy field at night. A bright moon illuminates the scene from the upper left, while a simple wooden fence runs along the right side of the dirt path. Tall grass surrounds the path as the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching wooden house in rural setting

events.description: wooden house becomes visible in the distance on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward the newly visible wooden house

entered.detail: two-story wooden house with lit windows and gabled roof
tall leafy tree next to the house

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues forward, a wooden house with illuminated windows comes into view on the right, partially obscured by a large tree. The wooden fence moves closer to the camera position while the moon exits the frame as the view focuses on the approaching structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: immediate vicinity of wooden house entrance

events.description: slowing down as approaching the house entrance

agents.ego_description: walking up to the front of the wooden house, approaching the entrance door

entered.detail: wooden door of the house at the entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the wooden house closely, with the structure now dominating the center of the frame. The house door becomes visible as the final destination. The wooden fence has been passed and is no longer visible, while the large tree now appears very close on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey across a moonlit grassy field that culminates at the entrance of a cozy wooden house. It begins with a steady walk along a dirt path, guided by a simple wooden fence on the right and a bright moon illuminating the surrounding tall grass. As the camera moves forward, the moon exits the frame and a wooden house with glowing windows emerges from behind a large tree. The scene then shifts focus toward the structure as the fence recedes behind the viewer and the large tree looms closer on the right. Finally, the camera arrives at the house, which now dominates the center of the frame as the view settles on the front door.
